hints.text: Gen4 = red & white **pickup trucks** (well blurred); Gen3 = white car w/ a long antenna
Plates **fully white w/ blue characters, no blue strip** on the left
**Unique yellow bollards w/ a white reflector** — extremely common on almost every rural road
Landscape **barren, treeless, dark grey volcanic soil** — looks like nowhere else in Northern Europe
Geologically active: lava fields, rift valleys, geothermal lakes, rugged towering mountains
Direction signs **yellow w/ a white inset box** for road numbers (dashed border = a nearby road, not yours)
**Icelandic**: unique letters **ð þ æ** (Ð); vowel accents á é í ó ö ú ý
Pedestrian signs **4 stripes w/ a yellow tint** — Iceland is the only European country w/ yellow-bg pedestrian signs; chevrons black/yellow
Street signs white bg/black text on lampposts; **all-white road lines** (no yellow → if yellow in a Nordic scene, think Norway/Finland)
Sparse coverage (densest SW); **ring road = 1**; other roads' **first digit = region, clockwise 2 (south) → 9**; red pickup SW / white NE; Westfjords = flat-top mountains
